notes.zh: 研究者官方个人主页和肖像来源。
notes.en: The researcher's official personal homepage and portrait source.

title.zh: Chatbot Arena：用 Elo 评分在真实环境中评测大语言模型
title.en: Chatbot Arena: Benchmarking LLMs in the Wild with Elo Ratings

notes.zh: LMSYS 官方文章，列出郑廉民、应莹、蒋玮霖等 Chatbot Arena 初始作者并介绍平台机制。
notes.en: Official LMSYS article listing Lianmin Zheng, Ying Sheng, Wei-Lin Chiang, and the other initial Chatbot Arena authors while describing the platform.

notes.zh: 由 legacy 事件记录生成的临时来源占位，需要后续补充主论文或原始资料。
notes.en: Temporary source placeholder generated from the legacy event record; add primary papers or original sources later.

title.zh: 《Chatbot Arena：基于人类偏好评估大语言模型的开放平台》
title.en: Chatbot Arena: An Open Platform for Evaluating LLMs by Human Preference

notes.zh: LMSYS 团队介绍匿名成对比较、众包投票、统计排名方法与平台数据的原始论文。
notes.en: The LMSYS team's original paper describing anonymous pairwise comparisons, crowdsourced voting, statistical ranking, and platform data.

notes.zh: 持续更新模型对战、用户偏好结果与分类排行榜的官方平台；排名会随新增投票和模型而变化。
notes.en: The official platform continuously updating model battles, preference results, and category leaderboards; rankings change as votes and models are added.

notes.zh: Stanford HAI 汇总 2024 至 2025 年模型性能、开放与闭源模型差距、推理成本和产业趋势的年度报告。
notes.en: Stanford HAI's annual synthesis of model performance, open-versus-closed model gaps, inference costs, and industry trends through 2024 and 2025.
